These multi‑agent, multi‑model scenarios bring us closer to an oft‑envisioned "GPS for Lifelong Learning," where learners receive clear pathways and guidance toward their ambitions. schedule_description: Succession risk and principal churn can quietly stall district momentum. Through breathwork, guided meditation, and intention setting, this 20-minute session helps you arrive fully present, clear, and ready to engage thoughtfully and energetically in the day ahead.

schedule_description: AI is no longer just a question of jobs gained or lost. It is reshaping how opportunity is created, accessed, and distributed across communities.
